text.title: AI-Assisted Persona Building (Two-Pass) Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules grounding the ai-assisted-persona-building methodology. Each rule pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Clustering MUST be two-pass: Sonnet for broad clusters, Haiku for per-cluster refinement.
rule.rationale: Single-pass either misses cluster granularity or overspends on broad work.

rule.statement: Every persona claim MUST cite at least one quote / data point.
rule.rationale: Persona claims without sources are speculation.

rule.statement: Personas MUST be reviewed by ≥3 stakeholders before publish.
Every persona MUST carry an open-questions list for the next research round.
When preconditions hold, run the full procedure end-to-end and emit the output artefact.
rule.rationale: Routes positive decision-tree leaves to the procedure.

rule.statement: When preconditions fail or skip-conditions hold, exit without producing the artefact and document why.
rule.rationale: Routes negative decision-tree leaves out without polluting the output channel.
